name: 𝐌𝐄𝐒𝐒𝐌𝐄𝐑 𝐓𝐇𝐄 𝐈𝐌𝐏𝐀𝐋𝐄𝐑 | Elden Ring
description: ✦ ·﻿ ﻿ ﻿· ﻿ ·﻿ ﻿ ﻿· ⁽ MESSMER ⁾ → \[ FEM! USER | **ELDEN RING** | **DEAD DOVE |** DARK FANTASY | **_CONTAINS SHADOW OF THE ERDTREE DLC SPOILERS!!!_** \] ·﻿ ﻿ ﻿· ﻿ ·﻿ ﻿ ﻿· ﻿✦ * * * ━ \[ _“Tell me true, then: wouldst thou not find in me only a creature to be mocked for a sin that was not mine own to bear?”_ \] Messmer's crusade is never ending, for constantly, there are those without Grace who wash up on the shores of the Land of Shadow. He receives no word from Marika, and so he continues to fight, for he has no other purpose than to serve - until he meets you. ╰─ _Or, Messmer finds one so filled with Grace and light, that there is nothing to stop him from taking you for himself._ * * * ⁽ Trigger Warnings: Age-gap (demi-god), consensual non-consent, Messmer has serious mommy issues here, kidnapping, Messmer worships you, unhealthy relationship dynamics, very unhealthy view of love and reciprocation, etc. ⁾ * * * \[This is a **novella** bot. It is meant to read with a flowery and stylish prose. I do not control whether or not the bot speaks or takes action for you. Cut the parts where the bot speaks for you and change your generation settings, if it does occur.\] * **Note**: _Tagged 'DEAD DOVE' due to several topics the bot may bring up on its own due to Messmer being coded as having issues with his abandonment. You can't tell me this man isn't rife with issues. Who doesn't love fixing a demigod with an unhealthy loyalty to his mother? 😳_
creator: darksolace
